name: flow
description: Flow — an embeddable in-app feedback + UAT overlay platform (extracted from SerenityEMR).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cmanohar/flow-core && npm run build -w @cmanohar/flow-feedback && npm run build -w @cmanohar/flow-server && npm run build -w @cmanohar/flow-admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @cmanohar/flow-core && npm run test -w @cmanohar/flow-feedback
